appDesc.message: One-click extraction of any page's content as a clean .md file

stObsidianTooLarge.message: Too large to send directly — copied to clipboard; paste into Obsidian.

errNoWebhook.message: No webhook configured — set one in settings.

errExtractFailed.message: Extraction failed — page may not have article content.

errBatchDenied.message: Permission declined — can't read the window's tabs without it.

errBatchNone.message: No clippable tabs — only regular https pages can be clipped.

errBatchAllFailed.message: Couldn't extract an article from any open tab.

errNothingToChunk.message: Nothing to chunk — the preview is empty.

errNoTables.message: No Markdown tables found in the preview.

errNoTranslateTarget.message: Set a target language in settings first.

errNoTranslator.message: Translation isn't supported by this browser.

errNoAi.message: On-device AI isn't supported by this browser.

errNoModel.message: Model not installed — use the Download model button in settings.

errTooLittle.message: Nothing to clean — the page has too little content.

stCleanupRejected.message: Cleanup skipped — the model flagged too much of the page to be trusted.

stCleanClean.message: No boilerplate found — the page already looks clean.

optLead.message: Choose which fields appear in the YAML front matter of extracted Markdown. Changes apply to future extractions. Everything runs locally — settings sync via your browser account only.

fdesc_source.message: The page URL the content came from.

fdesc_excerpt.message: A short summary/description of the page.

fdesc_summary.message: On-device AI TL;DR (only when enabled below and the model is installed).

fdesc_tags.message: On-device AI topic tags (only when enabled below and the model is installed).

fdesc_extracted.message: Timestamp of when you extracted it.

optVaultDesc.message: Optional. Used by Send to Obsidian. Leave blank to use your last-focused vault.

optFolderDesc.message: Optional. Files clipped notes under this vault-relative folder (e.g. Clippings/Web). Leave blank for the vault root.

optDailyName.message: Append to today's daily note instead

optDailyDesc.message: Send to Obsidian appends the clip to today's daily note rather than creating a new note. Requires the community Advanced URI plugin in your vault.

optSummaryName.message: Add a TL;DR summary to front matter

optSummaryDesc.message: Uses Chrome's built-in Summarizer — everything runs locally, nothing leaves your device. Only applies when the model is already installed; we never download it without you asking.

optTagsName.message: Add topic tags to front matter

optTagsDesc.message: 3–6 lowercase tags suggested by the same local model — handy for Obsidian/PKM organization. Same rules: local-only, and only when the model is already installed.

optCleanupName.message: Clean up leftover boilerplate in preview

optCleanupDesc.message: Adds a 🧹 Clean up button to the preview that asks the local model to flag leftover menus, cookie banners, share buttons, and footer junk — flagged blocks are removed, never rewritten. Same rules: local-only, and only when the model is already installed.

aiNotSupported.message: Not supported by this browser (needs Chrome 138+ with built-in AI).

aiDownloading.message: Model is downloading in the background…

aiNotInstalled.message: Model not installed (~a few GB, one-time).

optWebhookDesc.message: Optional. Send to webhook POSTs the extracted Markdown as JSON — works with n8n, Zapier, Make, or your own endpoint (Notion via a small proxy). HTTPS only (localhost may use HTTP). Saving asks the browser to grant access to just that site.

whInvalid.message: Invalid URL — must be https:// (or http://localhost).

optTargetDesc.message: Optional. Adds a 🌐 Translate button to the preview that translates the page's prose on-device (Chrome's built-in Translator) — code blocks, links, and front matter are left untouched. Use a two-letter code like en, he, es. Leave blank to disable.

optTemplatesDesc.message: Override the output layout for matching sites. Pattern is a domain (example.com matches subdomains too) or * for every site; the first match wins. Variables:
